indicators.name: bed
indicators.rationale: The bed is not suitable for computer work due to its height and lack of a flat surface.

indicators.name: floor-wood
indicators.rationale: The wooden floor is not suitable for computer work as it lacks a flat surface.

indicators.name: mirror-stuff
indicators.rationale: The mirror is not suitable for computer work as it is not a flat surface.

indicators.name: light
indicators.rationale: The floor lamp provides task lighting, which is positive for computer work.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (Solo). The presence of a bed and wooden floor makes it unsuitable for computer work, while the floor lamp provides positive task lighting. However, the lack of a flat surface on the bed and mirror makes it difficult to set up a computer workstation.
